sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this NES beat-em-up wrestling game

special_mechanics.name: Grapple System
special_mechanics.description: No dedicated grapple button; grapple initiated when wrestlers walk into each other. Combinations of joypad and buttons used to perform holds and slams.

special_mechanics.name: Situational Moves
special_mechanics.description: Ground attacks, high-risk top-rope aerial attacks, and running attacks available depending on context and positioning

special_mechanics.name: Ring Out Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: When wrestler is tossed out of ring, twenty-count starts. If still outside when count ends, wrestler is disqualified.

special_mechanics.name: Momentum Meter (2P Mode)
special_mechanics.description: Meter rapidly swings back and forth between both players, determining which player has advantage in grappling situations

tier_notes: Tier 3: No quantitative physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is a professional wrestling title focused on grappling mechanics and situational moves rather than platforming or precise movement physics. Documentation focuses on gameplay systems (grapple initiation, momentum meter, count-out mechanics) rather than movement statistics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Tecmo World Wrestling article
